title: File explorer: delete no longer blanks the folder
description:
Deleting a file or folder in PipeShare could blank the explorer until you left and re-entered the folder, and the deleted item often still appeared afterward.

That happened because delete refreshed only the job root listing while you stayed inside a subfolder, and cached tree data could bring deleted rows back. Delete now removes the item immediately, then reloads the folder you are in with a fresh (non-cached) listing.

Who is affected: PipeShare file explorer on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Fix delete leaving the explorer blank inside nested folders.
Cold-refresh the open folder after delete so removed items stay gone.
Same refresh path for rename, new folder, move, and paste.
Bypass browser/tree cache on post-delete listings.
